_doc: Curated characterization fixtures for src.matcher (extracted from src.ingest in Phase 1 of refactor-plan-2026-04-29.md). Each entry pins observed match_politicians() / extract_twitter_author_handle() output captured from master commit b0f9871 against data/atmina.db (politician IDs stable per tracked_politicians table).
_invariants: Each case targets a specific code path. Adding a new tracked politician with a previously unseen name MAY change expected_matches; adding one with conflicting first-name MAY change a foreign-firstname guard outcome. Update fixture deliberately when behavior changes.

match_politicians_cases.name: explicit-fullname
match_politicians_cases.comment: Plain full name → unique-form candidate, single subject role.
match_politicians_cases.text: Edgars Rinkēvičs šodien tikās ar premjeru.

match_politicians_cases.name: two-politicians-stable
match_politicians_cases.comment: Two distinct politicians, both unique-form. First (highest count, alphabetic tie) wins subject; rest mentioned.
match_politicians_cases.text: Edgars Rinkēvičs un Evika Siliņa apsprieda budžetu nākamajai sēdei.

match_politicians_cases.name: inflection-genitive-silinya
match_politicians_cases.comment: Latvian genitive ('Siliņas') resolves through _latvian_surname_inflections form generation.
match_politicians_cases.text: Siliņas viedoklis bija skaidrs — pretī šim risinājumam.

match_politicians_cases.name: surname-collision-bare
match_politicians_cases.comment: Bare 'Hermanis' without first-name disambiguator. Both Jānis (13) and Alvis (29) tracked. Truly ambiguous — first-name proximity filter (added 2026-05-13) drops both rather than guess. Old behavior returned both via inflection-not-shared accident; new behavior favors recall loss over false attribution.

match_politicians_cases.name: surname-collision-resolved-janis
match_politicians_cases.comment: Full name 'Jānis Hermanis' present → unique form match for pid=13. Alvis (29) dropped: shared-surname match without 'Alvis' or 'Alvja/Alvim/Alvi' preceding any Hermanis occurrence in text.
match_politicians_cases.text: Saeimas priekšsēdētāja vietnieks Jānis Hermanis vakar paziņoja par savu lēmumu.

match_politicians_cases.name: surname-collision-resolved-alvis
match_politicians_cases.comment: 'Alvis Hermanis' present → unique form match for pid=29. Jānis (13) dropped for same reason as the mirror case: no Jānis/Jāņa/Jānim/Jāni preceding any Hermanis form.

match_politicians_cases.name: negative-pattern-berzins-cebuvetaji
match_politicians_cases.comment: Andris Bērziņš (146) has negative_pattern 'biedrība Latvijas Ceļu būvētājs' — used to disambiguate from former president of same name. Pattern fires, match rejected.
match_politicians_cases.text: biedrība Latvijas Ceļu būvētājs uzaicināja Andri Bērziņu uz tikšanos.

match_politicians_cases.name: negative-pattern-berzins-eks
match_politicians_cases.comment: Negative pattern 'eks-prezidents' fires — refers to former president, not the tracked ZZS deputy.

match_politicians_cases.name: foreign-firstname-kalnins
match_politicians_cases.comment: 'Krists Kalniņš' — Krists is NOT Rūdolfs (the tracked Kalniņš's first name). foreign-firstname guard rejects.
match_politicians_cases.text: Krists Kalniņš teica, ka komiteja vēl nav lēmusi.

match_politicians_cases.name: foreign-firstname-kols
match_politicians_cases.comment: 'Tomass Alens' is Rihards Kols's negative_pattern (referring to a different person). Match rejected.
match_politicians_cases.text: Tomass Alens un Rihards Kols apsprieda situāciju.

match_politicians_cases.name: common-word-guard-krasta
match_politicians_cases.comment: 'Krasta iela' is street name, not politician 'Krasta' (if any). _surname_has_person_context returns False → no match.

match_politicians_cases.name: empty-match
match_politicians_cases.comment: Article without any politician reference returns empty list.
match_politicians_cases.text: Šodien Rīgā līs lietus, sola sinoptiķi. Rīt gaidāmas pārmaiņas atmosfēras spiedienā.
